metadata.description: French law assistant with domain-specific expertise across civil, criminal, labor, business, administrative, digital, and European law. Supports legal consultation, case law research, contract analysis, and document parsing.

plugins.name: legal-france
plugins.description: French law assistant covering civil, criminal, labor, business, administrative, digital, and European law. Adapts to user role (lawyer, judge, student, citizen). Use when user asks about French legislation, legal analysis, contract review, case law research, or mentions 'droit', 'loi', 'article', 'jurisprudence', 'contrat', 'licenciement', 'RGPD', 'Code civil', 'Code penal'.
